title: Rate Section Master
subtitle: Manage rate sections and ward groupings

wards.title: Wards
wards.deleteSuccess: {count, plural, =1 {Ward removed successfully} other {# wards removed successfully}}
wards.inUseError: "{wardName}" is in use. You cannot delete this ward.
wards.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete ward "{wardNo}" from rate section {displayZone}? This action cannot be undone.
wards.alreadyAssignedSingle: The ward "{wardNo}" is already assigned to Rate Section {rateSectionNo}.
wards.alreadyAssignedMultiple: The following wards are already assigned: {list}.
wards.noDataServer: No ward data received from server
wards.selectOneToSave: Please select at least one ward to save.
wards.saveError: Failed to save wards. Please try again.
wards.alreadyAssignedOther: {count} wards are already assigned to other rate sections.
wards.wardExistCurrent: Ward(s) {wards} already exist in this rate section and cannot be removed.
wards.addDescription: Select wards for this rate section
wards.selectRateSectionToView: Select a rate section to view wards
wards.verifyError: Failed to verify ward assignments. Please try again.
wards.validationError: An error occurred while validating wards.
wards.moveAllError: An error occurred while moving all wards.
wards.alreadyPresentInOtherRateSection: Clicked {wardNo} is already present in rate section {rateSectionNo}, you cannot add in this rate section {selectedRateSectionName}.
wards.emptyState: No wards assigned to this rate section. Select wards from Available Wards or View Wards tab to add them.

dialogs.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
dialogs.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this rate section?
dialogs.deleteErrorWards: The rate section "{name}" cannot be deleted because it currently has assigned wards. Please remove all associated wards first, then attempt to delete the rate section.
dialogs.deleteErrorRateMaster: Rate Section "{name}" cannot be deleted as it is currently in use within the Rate Master. Please remove the associated Rate Master entries before attempting to delete this rate section.

validation.descriptionFormat: {label} contains invalid characters. Only letters, numbers, and basic punctuation (/, -, &, etc.) are allowed.

messages.createExistsError: Rate Section "{name}" already exists or server error
messages.inUseError: "{name}" is in use. You cannot delete this rate section.

error.title: Something Went Wrong
error.description: We encountered an error while loading the rate section page. Please try again.
error.fixValidation: Please fill all required fields and try again.
error.saveFailed: Failed to save rate section. Please try again.

loading.description: Please wait while we fetch the rate section data
